basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee has released the official Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification on 03 May 2026 at the official website IIT Roorkee Official Website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a B.Tech degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent along with a qualified GATE score can apply through email mode on or before 13 May 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Preference will be given to SC/ST candidates on equal qualifications and experience.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Qualified GATE score.
qualification.details: B.Tech. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or equivalent with Qualified GATE score.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Roorkee Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 13-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate positions is 13th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Associate role, candidates must possess a B.Tech. degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or an equivalent qualification, along with a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Associate post announced by the Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate role?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Associate position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 60,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Roorkee Project Associate recruitment is to be done via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Project Associate posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Project Associate positions in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Project Associate posts will be based on an Interview. Shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview round.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate positions at IIT Roorkee are on a Contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Roorkee located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology, Roorkee is located in Roorkee, Uttarakhand. This is the city where the recruitment drive is being conducted.

faq.question: Q10. Will there be any age relaxation for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: While specific age limits are not detailed, the notification mentions that preference will be given to SC/ST candidates on equal qualifications and experience, suggesting a consideration for these categories.
